title: 2025 Ratings Winners: The Most Watched Shows and Movies
text: Squid Game Season 2 and Season 3 became Netflix's second and third most-watched non-English language shows with 192.6 million and 145.8 million views respectively. Wednesday Season 2 ranked fourth among English-language shows with 119.3 million views. Stranger Things Season 5's Volume 1 set a new record with 59.6 million views in its first five days. The Netflix film KPop Demon Hunters achieved unprecedented longevity, maintaining a top-10 position for 25 consecutive weeks, which is unusual even for major shows. The movie accumulated 325.1 million total views and became Netflix's most-watched film ever. ABC's Dancing With the Stars Season 34 demonstrated strong Gen Z engagement, with its finale reaching 9.2 million viewers. CBS maintained viewership dominance through Tracker and Matlock, which averaged 17.5 million and 16.1 million multiplatform viewers respectively. Prime Video's The Summer I Turned Pretty Season 3 reached 70 million viewers over 70 days, representing a 65% increase from Season 2. Peacock's Love Island USA Season 7 logged 18.4 billion minutes viewed, becoming the platform's most-watched original season.
